TEXT.id: Wiki_Atayal_mzyup_qmalup_Knyopan_ru_pintriqan_Pyasan_襲擊進入羅浮和復興爭鬥事件
TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: mzyup_qmalup_Knyopan_ru_pintriqan_Pyasan_襲擊進入羅浮和復興爭鬥事件
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = ryax pinlahang 年代政權 = . = ki'an rhzyal區域範圍 = . = 'ringan zyuwaw事件起因 = ryax nasa ka qmalup, kinButa gmleng gluw Mknazi ru lgan Mlipa naras mrhuw Bangay. musa mzyup qmalup uruw ki'an nqu paris nha sa Skahmayun. yasa rhzyal qani sllwan ta " Knyopan". qalang Rahaw son ta misuw. musa qmalup lozi ru tta sa zik na rgyax Pyasan misuw. qutux motux na mrhuw Payas lalu nya. moyay balay ptciriq squ mrhuw na Skahmayun Yaqih. memaw mtboyak mciriq. ana lmaqux tcingan ga wal si mgluw mhuqil kya la. strahu ru s'nun balay na ggluw ki kinButa. yasa sllwan " Pyasan" qu rhzyal qani. cyux maki lingay gowkosyo Pyasan misuw. Payas Yaqih, .kinButa Pyasan . zyaw pcingan 事件後影響 tayal Mlipa masoq ptriqan Knyopan lga, mbzinah musa nwayaw nha ru snwalan kinButa uzi qu uruw rhzyal Gogan. mbhuyaw mqyanux sqani ru tmwang slabang Gogan musa sa Tranan, Syanox, Talah. 馬力巴群經 Knyopan 此役後,就返回所選與 kinButa 應允之地 Gogan Gogan部族. Pyasan s'inu ta binkesan ru lalu na rhzyal qyunam ta Tayal uzi. nanu yasa rhzyal nwahan pinshzyal binkesan ta ga, rhzyal sqyanux mbhoyaw kinbahan ta Tayal krryax. Pyasan .
S.PHON: = rjax pinlaħaŋ **** = . = kiʔan rħzjal**** = . = ʔriŋan zjuwaw**** = rjax nas~ɕa ka qmalup, kinβuta ɣmleŋ ɣluw mknazi ru lɣan mlipa naras~ɕ mrħuw βaŋaj. mus~ɕa mzjup qmalup uruw kiʔan nqu paris~ɕ nħa s~ɕa s~ɕkaħmajun. jas~ɕa rħzjal qani s~ɕllwan ta " knjopan". qalaŋ raħaw s~ɕon ta mis~ɕuw. mus~ɕa qmalup lozi ru tta s~ɕa zik na rɣjax pjas~ɕan mis~ɕuw. qutux motux na mrħuw pajas~ɕ lalu nja. mojaj βalaj ptʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕqu mrħuw na s~ɕkaħmajun jaqiħ. memaw mtβojak mʦ~ʨiriq. ana lmaqux tʦ~ʨiŋan ɣa wal s~ɕi mɣluw mħuqil kja la. s~ɕtraħu ru s~ɕʔnun βalaj na ɣɣluw ki kinβuta. jas~ɕa s~ɕllwan " pjas~ɕan" qu rħzjal qani. ʦ~ʨjux maki liŋaj ɣowkos~ɕjo pjas~ɕan mis~ɕuw. pajas~ɕ jaqiħ, .kinβuta pjas~ɕan . zjaw pʦ~ʨiŋan ***** tajal mlipa mas~ɕoq ptriqan knjopan lɣa, mβzinaħ mus~ɕa nwajaw nħa ru s~ɕnwalan kinβuta uzi qu uruw rħzjal ɣoɣan. mβħujaw mqjanux s~ɕqani ru tmwaŋ s~ɕlaβaŋ ɣoɣan mus~ɕa s~ɕa tranan, s~ɕjanox, talaħ. ***** knjopan ***,****** kinβuta **** ɣoɣan ɣoɣan**. pjas~ɕan s~ɕʔinu ta βinkes~ɕan ru lalu na rħzjal qjunam ta tajal uzi. nanu jas~ɕa rħzjal nwaħan pins~ɕħzjal βinkes~ɕan ta ɣa, rħzjal s~ɕqjanux mβħojaw kinβaħan ta tajal krrjax. pjas~ɕan .
S.FORM: = ryax pinlahang 年代政權 = . = ki'an rhzyal區域範圍 = . = 'ringan zyuwaw事件起因 = ryax nasa ka qmalup, kinButa gmleng gluw Mknazi ru lgan Mlipa naras mrhuw Bangay. musa mzyup qmalup uruw ki'an nqu paris nha sa Skahmayun. yasa rhzyal qani sllwan ta " Knyopan". qalang Rahaw son ta misuw. musa qmalup lozi ru tta sa zik na rgyax Pyasan misuw. qutux motux na mrhuw Payas lalu nya. moyay balay ptciriq squ mrhuw na Skahmayun Yaqih. memaw mtboyak mciriq. ana lmaqux tcingan ga wal si mgluw mhuqil kya la. strahu ru s'nun balay na ggluw ki kinButa. yasa sllwan " Pyasan" qu rhzyal qani. cyux maki lingay gowkosyo Pyasan misuw. Payas Yaqih, .kinButa Pyasan . zyaw pcingan 事件後影響 tayal Mlipa masoq ptriqan Knyopan lga, mbzinah musa nwayaw nha ru snwalan kinButa uzi qu uruw rhzyal Gogan. mbhuyaw mqyanux sqani ru tmwang slabang Gogan musa sa Tranan, Syanox, Talah. 馬力巴群經 Knyopan 此役後,就返回所選與 kinButa 應允之地 Gogan Gogan部族. Pyasan s'inu ta binkesan ru lalu na rhzyal qyunam ta Tayal uzi. nanu yasa rhzyal nwahan pinshzyal binkesan ta ga, rhzyal sqyanux mbhoyaw kinbahan ta Tayal krryax. Pyasan .
S.PHON: = rjax pinlaħaŋ **** = . = kiʔan rħzjal**** = . = ʔriŋan zjuwaw**** = rjax nas~ɕa ka qmalup, kinβuta ɣmleŋ ɣluw mknazi ru lɣan mlipa naras~ɕ mrħuw βaŋaj. mus~ɕa mzjup qmalup uruw kiʔan nqu paris~ɕ nħa s~ɕa s~ɕkaħmajun. jas~ɕa rħzjal qani s~ɕllwan ta " knjopan". qalaŋ raħaw s~ɕon ta mis~ɕuw. mus~ɕa qmalup lozi ru tta s~ɕa zik na rɣjax pjas~ɕan mis~ɕuw. qutux motux na mrħuw pajas~ɕ lalu nja. mojaj βalaj ptʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕqu mrħuw na s~ɕkaħmajun jaqiħ. memaw mtβojak mʦ~ʨiriq. ana lmaqux tʦ~ʨiŋan ɣa wal s~ɕi mɣluw mħuqil kja la. s~ɕtraħu ru s~ɕʔnun βalaj na ɣɣluw ki kinβuta. jas~ɕa s~ɕllwan " pjas~ɕan" qu rħzjal qani. ʦ~ʨjux maki liŋaj ɣowkos~ɕjo pjas~ɕan mis~ɕuw. pajas~ɕ jaqiħ, .kinβuta pjas~ɕan . zjaw pʦ~ʨiŋan ***** tajal mlipa mas~ɕoq ptriqan knjopan lɣa, mβzinaħ mus~ɕa nwajaw nħa ru s~ɕnwalan kinβuta uzi qu uruw rħzjal ɣoɣan. mβħujaw mqjanux s~ɕqani ru tmwaŋ s~ɕlaβaŋ ɣoɣan mus~ɕa s~ɕa tranan, s~ɕjanox, talaħ. ***** knjopan ***,****** kinβuta **** ɣoɣan ɣoɣan**. pjas~ɕan s~ɕʔinu ta βinkes~ɕan ru lalu na rħzjal qjunam ta tajal uzi. nanu jas~ɕa rħzjal nwaħan pins~ɕħzjal βinkes~ɕan ta ɣa, rħzjal s~ɕqjanux mβħojaw kinβaħan ta tajal krrjax. pjas~ɕan .
